questions.prompt: ____ Amy finish her homework tomorrow?
questions.explanation: tomorrow 是未來時間，未來式疑問句把 Will 放句首，後面接原形動詞 finish。

questions.prompt: They will not ____ soccer next Sunday.
questions.explanation: will not 後面要接原形動詞，所以選 play。

questions.prompt: My brother ____ going to wash the car later.
questions.explanation: My brother 是單數主詞，be going to 的 be 要用 is。

questions.prompt: We are going to ____ a movie tonight.
questions.explanation: be going to 後面接原形動詞，所以選 watch。

questions.prompt: ____ you going to read this book tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 主詞是 you，be going to 的疑問句要用 Are you going to ...?

questions.prompt: Lisa will ____ at home next weekend.
questions.explanation: will 後面的動詞用原形，正確答案是 stay。

questions.prompt: The boys ____ going to clean the classroom after lunch.
questions.explanation: The boys 是複數主詞，be going to 要用 are going to。

questions.prompt: Will your mom ____ dinner tonight?
questions.explanation: Will 開頭的疑問句中，主要動詞要用原形 cook。

questions.prompt: I am not going to ____ milk today.
questions.explanation: be not going to 後面接原形動詞，所以選 drink。

questions.prompt: The cat will not ____ on the chair tonight.
questions.explanation: will not 後面要接原形動詞，正確答案是 sleep。

questions.prompt: Will the students ____ English next week?
questions.explanation: Will 開頭的未來式疑問句中，主要動詞要用原形 study。

questions.prompt: My parents ____ going to visit Taipei tomorrow.
questions.explanation: My parents 是複數主詞，be going to 要用 are going to。

questions.prompt: Ben is not going to ____ computer games tonight.
questions.explanation: is not going to 後面接原形動詞，所以選 play。

questions.prompt: ____ your teacher going to give a test tomorrow?
questions.explanation: your teacher 是單數主詞，be going to 疑問句要用 Is。

questions.prompt: They will not ____ late for school tomorrow.
questions.explanation: will not 後面接原形，be 動詞的原形是 be。

questions.prompt: I ____ going to clean my desk after class.
questions.explanation: 主詞 I 搭配 am，所以是 I am going to。

questions.prompt: Will Lisa ____ her aunt next Sunday?
questions.explanation: Will 開頭時，後面的主要動詞要用原形 visit。

questions.prompt: The boys are going to ____ in the park later.
questions.explanation: are going to 後面接原形動詞 run。

questions.prompt: ____ they watch a movie tonight?
questions.explanation: tonight 表示未來時間，未來式疑問句用 Will 開頭。

questions.prompt: My sister will ____ her room before dinner.
questions.explanation: will 後面接原形動詞，所以選 clean。

questions.prompt: We are not going to ____ lunch at school tomorrow.
questions.explanation: are not going to 後面接原形動詞 eat。

questions.prompt: ____ Tom going to ride his bike after school?
questions.explanation: Tom 是單數主詞，be going to 疑問句要用 Is Tom going to。

questions.prompt: The dog will not ____ outside tonight.
questions.explanation: will not 後面要用原形動詞 sleep。

questions.prompt: You ____ going to write a card tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 主詞 you 搭配 are，所以是 You are going to。

questions.prompt: Will your brother ____ his homework tonight?
questions.explanation: Will 後面接原形動詞 finish。

questions.prompt: Mia is going to ____ a song at the party.
questions.explanation: is going to 後面要接原形動詞 sing。

questions.prompt: ____ we going to meet at the library tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 主詞 we 搭配 are，疑問句用 Are we going to。

questions.prompt: I will not ____ TV before homework.
questions.explanation: will not 後面接原形動詞 watch。

questions.prompt: The children ____ going to make cards for Mom.
questions.explanation: The children 是複數主詞，要用 are going to。

questions.prompt: Will Amy and Ben ____ the classroom tomorrow?
questions.explanation: Will 後面接原形動詞 clean。

questions.prompt: She is not going to ____ milk today.
questions.explanation: is not going to 後面接原形動詞 drink。

questions.prompt: ____ your friends going to come here later?
questions.explanation: your friends 是複數主詞，be going to 疑問句要用 Are。

questions.prompt: Dad will ____ dinner after work.
questions.explanation: will 後面要用原形動詞 cook。

questions.prompt: We will not ____ in the classroom after school.
questions.explanation: will not 後面接原形動詞 run。

questions.prompt: Is Lily going to ____ the door?
questions.explanation: going to 後面接原形動詞 open。

questions.prompt: The students will ____ quiet during the test.
questions.explanation: will 後面接原形，be 動詞的原形是 be。

questions.prompt: I am going to ____ my grandma next weekend.
questions.explanation: am going to 後面要接原形動詞 visit。

questions.prompt: ____ Ben and Tom play soccer tomorrow?
questions.explanation: tomorrow 是未來時間，疑問句用 Will。

questions.prompt: My mom is going to ____ a new coat.
questions.explanation: is going to 後面接原形動詞 buy。

questions.prompt: They will not ____ English songs today.
questions.explanation: will not 後面要用原形動詞 sing。

questions.prompt: Are you going to ____ your hands before lunch?
questions.explanation: going to 後面接原形動詞 wash。

questions.prompt: He ____ be ten years old next year.
questions.explanation: next year 是未來時間，未來式用 will be。

questions.prompt: The girls are not going to ____ today.
questions.explanation: are not going to 後面接原形動詞 dance。

questions.prompt: Will the cat ____ on the bed tonight?
questions.explanation: Will 後面接原形動詞 sleep。

questions.prompt: Tom and I ____ going to draw pictures tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Tom and I 表示 we，所以要用 are going to。

questions.prompt: She will not ____ her bag at school.
questions.explanation: will not 後面接原形動詞 forget。

questions.prompt: ____ I going to be late?
questions.explanation: 主詞 I 搭配 am，疑問句是 Am I going to ...?

questions.prompt: The teacher is going to ____ the lesson tomorrow.
questions.explanation: is going to 後面接原形動詞 start。

questions.prompt: We will ____ at the bus stop after school.
questions.explanation: will 後面的動詞要用原形 meet。

questions.prompt: Is your dad going to ____ the car this weekend?
questions.explanation: going to 後面接原形動詞 wash。
